Interface IMapTableTimeDescription

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to time properties of a LayerDescription.

[Guid("7AE9366E-4894-43A6-96BA-3ABC58294058")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMapTableTimeDescription

Properties

TimeDataCumulative

Draw the data cumulatively from the first instance of time in data as time progresses.

bool TimeDataCumulative { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeOffset

Draw time offset to overlay the data on a earlier or later time span.

double TimeOffset { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeOffsetUnits

Draw time offset units.

esriTimeUnits TimeOffsetUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

esriTimeUnits

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseTime

Indicates whether use time for display.

bool UseTime { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
